title: India's LR-AShM Hypersonic Glide Missile Nears Trials; DRDO Chief Outlines Future Multi-Layered Strike Force
description: India’s LR-AShM hypersonic glide missile programme has reached an advanced stage, with initial trials expected soon, according to DRDO Chairman Samir V Kamat. Speaking at ANI’s National Security Summit 2.0, he outlined the differences between hypersonic glide and cruise missiles, and detailed India’s plans for a multi-layered conventional missile force.
